title: Shacknews Modpack
description:
A collection of excellent Fabric mods for a enhanced vanilla experience, used on the Shacknews SMP community server.

This modpack is no longer being updated.
body:
![Shacknews Modpack Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a1cbbd364caab2a695b41ff6a4f3134763b809a.png)

This modpack is a well curated collection of Fabric 1.21.1 mods that is aimed at an enhanced vanilla-like experience for multiplayer servers.  The Shacknews Modpack brings a slew of performance optimization mods, Decoration mods, QoL mods, Tech/Storage mods and a few other tweaks to improve the multiplayer experience.  If your looking for a Vanilla++ SMP experience, you found the right mod pack.

This modpack is used on the Shacknews Community SMP server, but is a great pack for any SMP that's looking for something that gives some nice enhancements to the vanilla experience.

Included Fabric Mods as of v1.1.0:
- AppleSkin
- Architectury API
- Athena
- Balm
- Better Compatibility Checker
- Bridging Mod
- Camera Utils
- Camerapture
- Chipped
- Chunk Loaders
- Cloth Config API
- Clumps
- Continuity
- Cooking for Blockheads
- Crafting Tweaks
- Default Options
- Display Case
- ElevatorMod
- Emoji Type
- Enchanted Vertical Slabs
- Energized Power
- Entity Culling
- Expanded Storage
- Extended Drawers
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- Forge Config API Port
- FrozenLib
- Global Packs

- Indium

- Iris Shaders
- Jade

Additional Credits:
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net
- Voodoo Packs: https://mc.voodoobeard.com

Vanilla Tweaks Datapacks in this Modpack: Afk display, Anti enderman grief, Armor statues, Double shulker shells, Fast leaf decay, Mini blocks, More mob heads, Nether portal cords, Player head drops & Silence mobs

Shulker Respawning Datapack by VoodooBeard
